positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala pattern featuring a central, radiant sun bursting through stylized jungle foliage and cosmic geometric shapes. The design should employ a limited, vibrant palette of deep indigo, jungle emerald green, metallic gold, and burnt orange. Use clean, thick lines and bold color blocking, emphasizing high contrast and strong silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. The composition must be perfectly centered and scalable, evoking a sense of mystic adventure and clean geometric harmony. Vector art aesthetic, flat design meets ornate illustration, ultra-detailed, high-resolution.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, grain, jpeg artifacts, low detail, multiple subjects, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs
